pillars.label: Data coverage
pillars.description: Share of expected synthetic inputs present.

flags.label: Low coverage
flags.tooltip: Fewer source observations than the model prefers.

flags.label: Controversy rising
flags.tooltip: Recent controversy proxy is moving against the company.

flags.label: Low liquidity
flags.tooltip: Trading liquidity may be below institutional thresholds.

flags.label: Stale data
flags.tooltip: Some source fields have not refreshed recently.
